name: CH23
cooked: there is good progress towards figuring out the basics. with that i mean that the firmware has been extracted from the device, but is not entirely ‘human readable’ as far as I understand it. the flash memory appears to be writable, but it’s not known how yet as the audio files are in a weird format.
raw: there is good progress towards figuring out the basics. with that i mean that the firmware has been extracted from the device, but is not entirely 'human readable' as far as I understand it. the flash memory appears to be writable, but it's not known how yet as the audio files are in a weird format.
